professional_summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable SaaS, fintech, and enterprise platforms using TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and NestJS. Experienced in designing distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven platforms using Kafka, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Redis, and AWS. Strong background in system design, technical ownership, performance optimization, and delivering reliable software at scale. Active user of AI-assisted development tools to accelerate engineering workflows, improve code quality, and increase delivery velocity.

achievements.description: Built a bulk product import pipeline processing 100K+ products using BullMQ workers, AWS S3, and validation workflows, reducing manual operations by 80%.
Architected and implemented event-driven microservices using Apache Kafka, defining service boundaries, asynchronous communication patterns, and fault-tolerant workflows across distributed systems.
Built gRPC-based internal services for inventory management, seller validation, voucher engine, and logistics integrations.
Delivered a full order lifecycle system with third-party logistics API integration, SLA tracking, automated notifications, and real-time operational dashboards.
Resolved BullMQ + Redis queue bottlenecks, retry failures, and timeout instability under high-load workloads, improving job processing reliability and overall system throughput.
Developed high-performance seller and admin dashboards using React and NestJS, improving usability for complex operational workflows.
Contributed to frontend architecture and implementation for a fintech trading platform handling real-time market data, transactional workflows, and compliance-sensitive user operations.
Built websocket-driven real-time dashboard updates for high-frequency market activity, optimizing rendering performance through React memoization and structured state management.
Designed scalable frontend state management workflows for authentication, onboarding, trading operations, and real-time portfolio synchronization.

Implemented TOTP-based multi-factor authentication, device fingerprinting, and KYC/AML onboarding workflows using Sumsub OCR verification, reducing unauthorized access incidents and improving user verification efficiency.
Built multilingual platform support across 5+ languages using Next.js and i18Next, while improving frontend maintainability through reusable component structures and modular dashboard layouts.
Collaborated with backend, product, and QA teams to deliver responsive production-ready financial workflows, including server-side PDF certificate generation and operational dashboard features.
Designed and maintained a public-facing GraphQL API platform powering integrations with Zapier, Notion, and Google Docs, handling thousands of developer requests daily.
Reduced third-party integration time by 40% through improved API schema design, structured developer documentation, and consistent error contracts.
Implemented OAuth2 authentication, token-based rate limiting, and fault-tolerant error handling for high-concurrency API traffic.
Integrated Airtable as a headless CMS backend, reducing internal content operations workload by 20%.
Established observability using Datadog (metrics, traces, alerting), achieving and sustaining 99.9% API uptime.
Built a government-backed digital investment platform in React.js, contributing to a 23% increase in regional investment registrations.
Developed a QR-code-based digital certificate system, reducing manual certificate processing time by 30%.
Migrated 30+ legacy Laravel views to modern React components while preserving data integrity and API compatibility.
Collaborated with backend and QA teams to deliver responsive, production-ready features with improved usability and cross-browser compatibility.
